creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
(In reply to pete from comment #7)
As a follow up from:

[27143:373318656:0724/181312:ERROR:browser_main_loop.cc(223)] Gtk: cannot open display: 


The issue was trying to run:

> work/stage/usr/local/share/chromium/chrome-wrapper --gdb

While in root.

I am able to run chromium w/ debug symbols now through a normal user! Excellent! Thank you!
